features: Rebuilt Pending Dispatch page from table into command-center work queue
Added header with search, filters toggle, and refresh
Added KPI row: Total Pending, High Priority, Average Response, Assigned Today, SLA At Risk
Added priority tabs: All Requests, High Priority, Medium Priority, Low Priority
Added filter dropdowns for Priority, Property Type, Client, Requested Time, Status
Added request table with selectable rows, priority badges, age, distance, status, and assignment actions
Added selected request right rail with property photo, owner/client data, address, requested-for details, instructions, and mini route map
Added Assign Guard button and row Assign buttons using existing assignment flow
Added Auto Assign, Assign Selected, Refresh, Clear Filters, pagination, and rows-per-page controls
